name: Paper
description: Clean, minimal collaboration aesthetic with warm whites and content-focused design. Natural animations, generous whitespace, inspired by Notion and iA Writer.

decorators.paper-canvas: Warm cream background in light mode, soft charcoal in dark. Clean foundation for content.
decorators.paper-surface: Clean panel surface with subtle warmth. Used for sidebars and elevated areas.
decorators.paper-card: Minimal card styling with 1px warm border, 6px radius, no shadow. Content over decoration.
decorators.paper-input: Warm gray border with teal focus ring. Clean input styling for forms and editors.
decorators.paper-divider: Hairline separator using warm gray. Subtle content division.
decorators.paper-prose: Optimized typography for reading. 16px base, 1.75 line-height, Inter font stack, max-width 680px.
decorators.paper-comment: Comment bubble with subtle shadow and presence color accent. Used in comment threads.
decorators.paper-cursor: Remote cursor SVG with name label. Colored by collaborator presence color.
decorators.paper-presence: Avatar ring indicating collaborator presence. Ring color matches assigned presence color.
decorators.paper-selection: Highlighted text selection for remote collaborators. Tinted with presence color at 20% opacity.
decorators.paper-fade: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, 180ms natural easing. No translation.

editor.description: Document editor with real-time collaboration. Page tree, editor, and comment sidebar.

workspace.description: Workspace dashboard with activity and recent documents.

auth.description: Centered auth forms with clean card styling.

marketing.description: Marketing pages with top nav and footer. Clean sections with generous whitespace.
